sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 62:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 62:1
items.html: The reflected light, to the extent of its own measure, “rations” the upper light. This is because the only way for the light to be in the emanated being is if it is clothed in reflected light.
